jobs.title: PCB Design for Suspension Emulator
jobs.description:
I am developing an automotive electronics module whose purpose is to electronically emulate the factory suspension feedback system in a vehicle.

The module’s function is to reproduce the sensor feedback signals expected by the OEM controller so the vehicle continues to see a valid suspension state when the original dampers or related hardware are removed or replaced.

Scope of work:

* Design a compact automotive-grade PCB schematic and layout for this emulator.
* Implement the required signal generation and conditioning so the ECU receives the correct suspension feedback signals.

jobs.description:

• Import the public-CA root/intermediate chain into pfSense and generate or import matching server and client certificates.
